parameters.apprise_url_plus: bulkvs://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.user_secret }} }:${ customer_secrets.{{ params.password_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.from_phone_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own BulkVS destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise bulkvs:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a BulkVS messageSend JSON body and post it to portal.bulkvs.com (no Apprise).
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"From":"${ customer_secrets.BULKVS_SMS_FROM_PHONE }","To":"${ customer_secrets.BULKVS_SMS_TO }","Message":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "") .. ((_body.title and _body.title ~= "" and _body.body and _body.body ~= "") and ": " or "") .. (_body.body or "")) *}}
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to BulkVS messageSend (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment BulkVS destinations, direct

from_phone_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's BulkVS from phone

password_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's BulkVS password

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's BulkVS targets

user_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's BulkVS user
